scripts.deps:policy: node -e "const p=require('./package.json');const bad=[];for(const s of ['dependencies','devDependencies','optionalDependencies']){for(const [n,v] of Object.entries(p[s]||{})){if(v==='latest'||v==='*')bad.push(s+':'+n+'@'+v)}} if(bad.length){console.error('Blocked dependency specs\n'+bad.join('\n'));process.exit(1)} console.log('deps policy ok')"
scripts.deps:policy:lockfile: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f=fs.existsSync('pnpm-lock.yaml')?'pnpm-lock.yaml':(fs.existsSync('package-lock.json')?'package-lock.json':null); if(!f){console.log('no lockfile found');process.exit(0)} const t=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');const bad=[...t.matchAll(/https?:\/\/([^\s'\"]+)/g)].map(m=>m[1]).filter(h=>!h.startsWith('registry.npmjs.org')); if(bad.length){console.error('Disallowed lockfile hosts:\n'+[...new Set(bad)].join('\n'));process.exit(1)} console.log('lockfile host policy ok')"
